title: Green corelib scans, JIT composition, export FFI scaffold

source.subject: fix(ci): green corelib scans, JIT composition, and export FFI scaffold

body:
## What shipped

Adds `ffi_v03` CI scaffold jobs exercising export FFI paths without blocking unrelated compiler workflows.

## Source commit

Repository **`compiler`** · commit `2957086`

> fix(ci): green corelib scans, JIT composition, and export FFI scaffold

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
